ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on damage rolls against enemies with heavy Natural Defense or Shields.
ranks.2: Action: Once per encounter, perform a Sunder attack. If successful, shatter the enemy's shield or destroy their cover.
ranks.3: Passive: Your melee attacks ignore 50% of an enemy's Injury Resistance.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, strike the ground to create a 10ft shockwave. All enemies fall Prone and take bludgeoning damage.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, perform an execution strike. Target must pass a Fortitude Check or immediately suffer a Critical Injury.

ranks.1: Action: Once per encounter, declare a weak point. Gain Advantage on your next Attack check against that target.
ranks.2: Passive: Your unarmed and finesse weapons critical hit on a natural 19-20.
ranks.3: Passive: You may substitute Reflexes for Might on all melee attack damage rolls.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, strike 3 different targets within your melee reach simultaneously.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, instantly sever an enemy limb or artery with a single flawless strike.

ranks.1: Passive: If you took no offensive actions on your last turn, gain Advantage on your first Attack check this turn.
ranks.2: Action: Once per encounter, enter a reactive stance. Automatically counterattack the first enemy that misses you.
ranks.3: Passive: Moving out of an enemy's reach no longer provokes Free Attacks.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, bait an enemy into attacking you. If they miss, you instantly disarm them.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, flawlessly parry a lethal blow and reflect 100% of the damage back onto the attacker.

ranks.1: Passive: You do not suffer Disadvantage when making ranged attacks in close-quarters (within 5ft).
ranks.2: Passive: You may move up to 10ft after taking a shot without spending an Action.
ranks.3: Passive: Firing from elevated terrain grants +1d4 bonus damage.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, shoot an incoming projectile out of the air, fully negating its attack.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, fire a localized barrage. Attack all enemies within a 15ft cone simultaneously.

ranks.1: Action: Once per encounter, gain Advantage on a Critical Injury Check to cripple a target's limb.
ranks.2: Passive: Ignore penalties for shooting into darkness, mist, or partial cover.
ranks.3: Passive: If you spend your Move action aiming, your ranged attacks gain double effective range and ignore armor.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, pin an enemy's limb to a wall or surface with a projectile, reducing their Speed to 0.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, fire an unerring shot that ignores Line of Sight and passes through solid walls.

ranks.1: Action: Once per encounter, throw an object or weapon with such force the target must pass a Fortitude Check or be Staggered.
ranks.2: Passive: Thrown weapons deal bludgeoning damage in a 5ft radius on impact.
ranks.3: Passive: You can smoothly catch weapons or objects thrown at you without spending an action.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, throw an ally up to 30ft to safely reposition them or set up an aerial attack.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, throw an object so hard it creates a concussive shockwave, knocking everyone within 20ft Prone.

ranks.1: Passive: Immune to Forced Movement. Advantage on checks to resist being Disarmed.
ranks.2: Passive: Any enemy attempting to push or grapple you takes 1d4 bludgeoning damage from recoil.
ranks.3: Passive: As long as you did not move this turn, you gain +2 Natural Defense.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, brace against a massive AOE attack. You and allies standing directly behind you take no damage.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, become an immovable object. You cannot take damage or be moved for 1 entire round.

ranks.1: Action: Once per encounter, automatically convert a Solid Hit against you into a Graze (half damage).
ranks.2: Passive: While unarmored, you may substitute your Reflexes for your Natural Defense.
ranks.3: Passive: Standing up from Prone costs 0 Movement Speed.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, effortlessly slip through a restraint, grapple, or locked door hinge.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, flow like water to instantly escape any magical trap, elemental prison, or collapsing structure.

ranks.1: Passive: Winning an opposed Clash roll grants Advantage on your next Assault action against that opponent.
ranks.2: Passive: Gain +2 Natural Defense as long as you are engaged with exactly one enemy.
ranks.3: Action: Once per encounter, force an engaged enemy to target only you on their next turn.
ranks.4: Passive: Whenever an enemy misses you with a melee attack, they provoke a Free Attack from you.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, challenge a foe. Neither of you can target anyone else, and nobody else can target either of you until one yields.

ranks.1: Action: Once per cycle, declare a hex. Any enemy entering it must pass a Willpower Check or their movement drops to 0.
ranks.2: Passive: You may take two Free Attacks (Reactions) per turn instead of one.
ranks.3: Passive: You cannot be surprised or ambushed while conscious.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, intercept an attack meant for an adjacent ally, taking the damage yourself.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, instantly end the movement of any entity on the battlefield before they take their action.

ranks.1: Passive: Enemies within 10ft of you suffer Disadvantage on Initiative rolls.
ranks.2: Action: Once per encounter, release a terrifying aura. All enemies in 15ft must step backward.
ranks.3: Passive: Your sheer presence grants you Advantage on Intimidation checks against creatures smaller than you.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, stare down a charging enemy, forcing them to abort their attack and lose their action.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, draw all aggro. Every enemy within Line of Sight must target you on their next turn.

ranks.1: Action: Once per encounter, subtly threaten a target. They suffer Disadvantage on their next offensive action unless they move out of Line of Sight.
ranks.2: Passive: Advantage on all Intimidation checks to make enemies surrender.
ranks.3: Passive: You deal +2 Composure damage on every successful melee attack.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, loudly promise a painful death to a Staggered enemy, forcing them to drop their weapons and flee.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, speak a word of pure terror. Target permanently surrenders and flees the battle.

ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on checks strictly related to jumping, climbing, or balancing.
ranks.2: Passive: You may jump from a standstill as if you had a running start.
ranks.3: Passive: You never take fall damage from heights under 30ft.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, scramble up a sheer vertical surface up to 30ft high without needing handholds.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, traverse up to 60ft across any surface (including water or sheer walls) without falling.

ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on Stealth checks in dim light or natural environments.
ranks.2: Passive: You leave absolutely no footprints or scent trail.
ranks.3: Passive: You can attempt to hide even if you are only lightly obscured or in partial cover.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, slip into a shadow and instantly teleport up to 15ft to another shadow.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, turn completely invisible (cannot be seen by mundane or magical means) for 1 minute.

ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on checks to survive extreme weather (heat, cold, rain).
ranks.2: Passive: You require half as much food, water, and sleep to survive.
ranks.3: Passive: You automatically succeed on Fortitude checks to resist exhaustion from forced marches.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, push through a crippling debuff (like Paralysis or Stun) to take a normal turn anyway.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, push your body beyond its limits, ignoring all injuries and exhaustion entirely for 1 hour.

ranks.1: Passive: You no longer need specialized tools to pick locks or disarm traps, using hairpins or wire instead.
ranks.2: Action: Once per encounter, instantly jam a mechanical door or hinge mid-combat to create or deny a flanking route.
ranks.3: Passive: You intuitively know the exact mechanism type and difficulty of any trap or lock simply by looking at it within 10ft.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, rig a door, chest, or object to explosively backfire on the next person who touches it (deals 2d6 piercing damage).
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, Clockwork Autopsy. Instantly decode, disable, and command an entire room's physical trap network seamlessly.

ranks.1: Action: Once per encounter, interact with the environment (cut a rope, drop a chandelier) to gain Advantage on your next action.
ranks.2: Passive: Advantage on checks specifically to craft crude bombs or chemical traps from local materials.
ranks.3: Passive: Any explosive or trap you construct ignores 50% of the target's Injury Resistance.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, silently dismantle a vital component of an enemy's weapon or siege engine before combat starts.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, perfectly collapse a structure, bridge, or tunnel using minimal force applied to a critical stress point.

ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on repairing broken equipment, weapons, or armor.
ranks.2: Action: Once per encounter, rapidly repair a sundered shield or broken firearm mid-combat.
ranks.3: Passive: Weapons and tools you actively maintain gain +1 Durability permanently.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, rapidly mod an ally's weapon mid-combat to deal an extra 1d6 elemental damage for 1 round.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, cobble together a fully functional mechanism, vehicle, or firearm from scrap parts.

ranks.1: Action: Once per encounter, you may attempt to stabilize a dying ally or stitch a wound as a Bonus Action instead of a Main Action.
ranks.2: Passive: Bandages applied by you grant the target 1d4 temporary Hit Points.
ranks.3: Passive: You can identify exactly how much HP an ally or enemy has remaining with a glance.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, perfectly set a broken bone or severe injury, restoring full use of a crippled limb temporarily (1 hour).
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, perfectly resuscitate a teammate who has recently died (within the last 5 minutes).

ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on all checks to forage for herbs, cure poisons, or brew antitoxins.
ranks.2: Passive: You are entirely immune to ingested and inhaled poisons.
ranks.3: Action: Once per encounter, coat your or an ally's weapon in a fast-acting paralytic or necrotic venom.
ranks.4: Passive: Healing potions or tonics consumed or administered by you roll maximum value automatically.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, brew a miraculous tonic that instantly purges all diseases, curses, and toxins from a target.

ranks.1: Passive: During a Rest Cycle, you have Advantage on checks to heal Severe Body Injuries and remove scars.
ranks.2: Passive: You can perform deep surgery without specialized medical tools.
ranks.3: Action: Once per encounter, quickly stitch a vital artery mid-combat, recovering 25% of the target's Max HP instantly.
ranks.4: Passive: Patients you treat during a Rest Cycle recover double the normal amount of Stamina and HP.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, successfully reattach a totally severed limb or repair a completely crushed internal organ.

ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on checks to identify magical effects, wards, and leylines.
ranks.2: Action: Once per encounter, determine the exact spell or school of magic an enemy is preparing before they cast it.
ranks.3: Passive: You can see the lingering auras of spells that were cast within the last 24 hours.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, violently counterspell a magical attack by throwing raw Focus at the caster.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, flawlessly decode, absorb, or safely disarm a lethal magical glyph or cursed artifact.

ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on Survival checks to follow tracks or read unnatural signs in the wilderness.
ranks.2: Passive: You can determine the exact age and species of a track at a glance.
ranks.3: Passive: You always know exactly which direction North is, and can never become lost by mundane means.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, pinpoint the exact location of an invisible or hidden enemy based on environmental shifting.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, flawlessly reconstruct a brutal scene in your mind just by examining the tracks, blood, and broken foliage.

ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on checks to recall lore, lineage, architecture, and historical events.
ranks.2: Passive: You can accurately translate dead languages and runic scripts.
ranks.3: Passive: You are keenly aware of the socio-political hierarchy of any city or faction you enter.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, identify the specific architectural weakness in an enemy fortress, golem, or stronghold.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, recall a devastatingly secret piece of lore about an enemy faction, exposing their fatal flaw.

ranks.1: Action: Once per encounter, force a target to roll a Composure Check with Disadvantage or be Frightened for 1 turn.
ranks.2: Passive: You can use Might instead of Charm when attempting to intimidate.
ranks.3: Passive: Your Frightened enemies suffer Disadvantage on literally all attack rolls made against you.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, issue a terrifying roar that strips 1 Composure from every enemy within 30ft instantly.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, project such an overwhelming aura of dread that all enemies in 30ft completely break Composure.

ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on Social checks when attempting to lie, bluff, or feint.
ranks.2: Action: Once per encounter, flawlessly mimic an enemy's voice to issue a confusing or disastrous order.
ranks.3: Passive: Magical zones of truth or telepathic surface scans register your lies as absolute truth.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, perfectly feign death or incapacitation. Enemies will ignore you until you act.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, weave a lie so profoundly believable that it completely shifts a major NPC's core worldview permanently.

ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on Social checks when negotiating, bribing, or bartering.
ranks.2: Passive: You instantly know a target's deepest desire after speaking to them for 1 minute.
ranks.3: Passive: Merchants and traders passively offer you a 20% discount or premium on all goods.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, fast-talk a neutral or hesitant guard/enemy into letting you pass briefly.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, talk a hostile enemy off the ledge, fully converting them into a temporary ally.

ranks.1: Passive: While at Maximum Composure, you have Advantage on all defense checks.
ranks.2: Passive: You are completely immune to the Frightened and Charmed conditions.
ranks.3: Passive: Mental fractures and traumas do not impose standard tactical penalties on you.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, ignore a mind-altering command or spell completely.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, automatically convert a lethal Mind Injury or sanity break into a minor Graze.

ranks.1: Passive: You may use Logic instead of Willpower when making checks to resist Horrifying Sights.
ranks.2: Passive: Advantage on checks to instantly see through illusions and magical disguises.
ranks.3: Passive: Your mind is perfectly organized; you cannot have your memory altered or wiped.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, forcefully logic your way out of a magical maze, puzzle, or spatial distortion.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, use pure logic to shatter an ancient magical enchantment or grand mind-control effect entirely.

ranks.1: Action: Once per encounter, taunt an attacker who misses you. They suffer 1d4 Composure damage immediately.
ranks.2: Passive: Any psychic damage dealt to you is reflected back to the caster at half strength.
ranks.3: Passive: You gain Advantage on Attack checks against any enemy that dealt damage to you last turn.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, spit blood in the face of an enemy grappling you, immediately breaking the hold.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, upon reaching 0 Composure, refuse to yield. Instantly regenerate 50% Composure and gain Advantage on all attacks.

ranks.1: Action: Once per encounter, grant an ally within 30ft +2 to their Composure Defense for 1 round.
ranks.2: Action: Once per encounter, you can Rally (heal) the Composure of all allies in 15ft simultaneously.
ranks.3: Passive: Any ally standing adjacent to you gains Advantage on checks to resist fear.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, issue a warcry that grants all allies an immediate free Move action.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, instantly clear all fear, trauma, and negative mental statuses from the entire party.

ranks.1: Passive: Advantage on checks to navigate or lead the party through treacherous terrain.
ranks.2: Action: Once per encounter, give an ally the 'Help' action from up to 30ft away.
ranks.3: Passive: When you take the Help action, the ally adds your Logic modifier to their roll result.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, perfectly coordinate a breach. All allies gain Advantage on their initiative roll.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, grant an ally an automatic Critical Success (Natural 20) on a non-combat skill check.

ranks.1: Passive: You can sense the exact emotional state and Composure level of any creature you talk to.
ranks.2: Passive: Your soothing presence passively heals 1 Composure per hour to all resting allies.
ranks.3: Passive: You can telepathically communicate basic emotions to allies within 60ft.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, calm a raging or panicked beast/enemy, pausing their aggression for 1 round.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, absorb a severe Mind Injury or Trauma from an ally, taking it upon yourself instead.

ranks.1: Action: Once per cycle, command an ally. They may instantly swap their active reserved Loadout points without penalty.
ranks.2: Action: Once per encounter, grant a teammate an extra Move Action on their turn.
ranks.3: Passive: Allies striking a target you just damaged gain +2 to their Attack rolls.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, order an ally to immediately take a Free Attack against an enemy entering your Line of Sight.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, totally rearrange the Initiative order of the entire battlefield.

ranks.1: Action: Once per encounter, if an enemy becomes Staggered, you may instantly jump your turn order to act immediately after them.
ranks.2: Passive: You deal 1d4 extra damage to enemies suffering from a status effect (Poison, Bleed, Prone).
ranks.3: Passive: You constantly score critical hits on a 19-20 against Staggered or Prone enemies.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, trip an already Staggered enemy, forcing them Prone and stripping their Action next turn.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, instantly identify an enemy boss's specific weakness or gimmick.

ranks.1: Passive: If you act first in the Initiative order, all allies gain +5ft Move Speed for the duration of the first round.
ranks.2: Passive: Allies standing adjacent to you gain +1 Natural Defense.
ranks.3: Passive: You and adjacent allies cannot be Flanked by enemies.
ranks.4: Action: Once per encounter, instantly forcibly reposition an ally up to 10ft out of harm's way before an attack lands.
ranks.5: Action: Once per cycle, magically swap the physical locations of any two willing allies on the battlefield.
